Categories.title: Categories we work with
Categories.description: Unique designs for every type of celebration. Choose your category and customize every detail to create the perfect invitation.

steps.title: Choose your favorite design
steps.description: Over 200 professional-grade templates. Elegant weddings, modern celebrations, corporate events — premium designs for any occasion.

steps.title: Customize in minutes
steps.description: Change the text, upload your photos, choose colors and add your music. If you use WhatsApp, you can use Bento. No design, no complications.

steps.title: Share and done
steps.description: Send the link via WhatsApp, Instagram or email. Your guests confirm with a tap and you see responses in real time. No calls, no spreadsheets, no headaches.

Features.title: Everything you need in one place
Features.description: Each invitation comes with all the tools you need to create a memorable experience for your guests

features.title: Premium designs that impress
features.description: Professional quality digital invitations that surpass any printed card. Smooth animations, elegant typography and superior-level designs created by expert designers.

features.title: Automatic confirmations (no chasing anyone)
features.description: Forget calling one by one asking "are you coming?". Your guests confirm with a tap and you see the updated list instantly from your phone. That simple.

features.title: Share anywhere you want
features.description: One link that works on WhatsApp, Instagram, email or wherever you want. No apps to download, no registration, nothing weird for your guests. They open and that's it.

features.title: Everyone chooses the music
features.description: Let your guests add the songs they want to hear on your Spotify playlist. The event DJ is collaborative. And you ensure that what everyone likes is played.

features.title: Everything in one place
features.description: Date, location with map, photo gallery, suggested gift list, playlist and attendance confirmation. Everything on one page that your guests save and can reopen when needed.

features.title: Change whatever you want, whenever you want
features.description: Did the date change? The place? Want to add something? You edit from your panel and everyone with the link sees the updated version. No resending, no confusion.

Features.benefitsDescription: Our comprehensive service ensures you have everything you need to create the perfect invitation without extra worries.
benefits: Instant delivery via WhatsApp or email
Features.experienceDescription: Everything you need to create unforgettable moments

Testimonials.title: What our users say
Testimonials.subtitle: Over 10,000 events organized in Argentina. These are some who trusted Bento.

testimonials.name: Florencia Sandez
testimonials.quote: I wasn't sure how it would turn out. But when my friends started writing to me asking how we made the invitation, I understood it was worth it. I had the confirmed list in real time, without calling anyone.

testimonials.name: Valeria Méndez
testimonials.quote: My daughter wanted something special and Bento exceeded it. In 10 minutes we had the invitation ready and all guests confirmed on their own. Never going back to paper invitations.

testimonials.name: Santiago Ríos
testimonials.quote: Used it for my dad's 50th and it was a total success. I sent the link via WhatsApp and in two days I already had 60 confirmations. Simple, fast and looked amazing.

faqs.question: Do guests need to download anything?
faqs.answer: No. The link opens directly in the phone browser — no app, no login, nothing. Anyone who receives the link can see the invitation instantly.

faqs.question: Can I edit the invitation after sending it?
faqs.answer: Yes. If the date, place changed, or you want to add something, you edit from your panel and those who already have the link see the updated version automatically. No resending.

faqs.question: How do my guests confirm?
faqs.answer: With one tap. They open the link, tap 'Confirm attendance' and done. You see who confirmed in real time from your dashboard, without having to call or ask each one.

faqs.question: Is it complicated to set up?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our users have their invitation ready in less than 10 minutes. If you can write a WhatsApp message, you can create your invitation in Bento.

faqs.question: Is it worth it if I send everything via WhatsApp anyway?
faqs.answer: Yes, you share it via WhatsApp the same. The difference is that instead of an image that gets lost in the scroll, you send a link that opens as a premium experience. And you know who confirmed without asking each one.

faqs.question: Does it work for corporate events?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have plans for companies with specific functionalities for corporate events, launches and meetings. Contact us to create something custom.
